items.title: Fever at Aces on Sunday night averaged 2.64 million viewers on NBC/Peacock — becoming the second most-watched WNBA regular-season game since 2000.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Fever at Aces on Sunday night averaged 2.64 million viewers on NBC/Peacock — becoming the second most-watched WNBA regular-season game since 2000.

The network has been averaging 1.5M viewers over four games this season.

This was a massive draw with names and star power.

items.title: The Boston Celtics have signed Tucker DeVries and Milos Uzan to Exhibit 10 contracts, a league source told @spotrac.com.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The Boston Celtics have signed Tucker DeVries and Milos Uzan to Exhibit 10 contracts, a league source told @spotrac.com. 

E10 deals are non-guaranteed training camp contracts. After camp the vast majority of E10 signings will end up joining the franchise’s G League affiliate.

items.title: Weird stat:
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
Weird stat:

Caleb Wilson is shooting .480 from three and .231 from the free throw line in summer league.

He shot .259 from three and .713 from the free throw line in college.

Upside down...

#NBA
